description: Unified view of the Integra-7 signal routing: per-instrument output assign (drum keys → Comp+EQ units), Comp+EQ unit output assign, part output assign (A/B/C/D/1-8), chorus/reverb output assign. Currently scattered across mixer, drum editors, CompEqPanel, and FX panels. Goal: a coherent routing view showing the full signal flow in one place.
title: Output routing management
